name: Spanokopita Greek Spinach and Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the onion and sauté it until golden brown.
2. Wash the spinach. Rub it with salt to reduce volume. Let sit for 15 minutes or steam briefly (30-60 seconds).
3. Beat the eggs. Crumble the feta cheese and add to the eggs. You can replace half or all of the feta with ricotta cheese.
4. Rinse the salt from the spinach and mix it with onions and eggs/cheese. Add spices such as salt, pepper, oregano, and basil.
5. Butter a 9x13 inch baking dish. Lay filo dough one layer at a time, brushing each with butter.
6. Turn each successive layer slightly so they are not all piled directly on top of each other. Continue until you have 3-5 sheets left.
7. Pour the filling into the filo layers. Fold over the excess filo on the sides.
8. Place remaining filo pieces on top, buttering each as you go. Trim any excess that hangs over the edge.
9. Make two or three slits in the top layers of filo down to the filling.
10. Bake at 375°F for 50 minutes.
Serves 8
